description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, deploy, dast. Add a dast job that runs in the dast stage, uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/dast:$CI_SERVER_VERSION_MAJOR-$CI_SERVER_VERSION_MINOR-stable, allows failure, and only runs on branch refs when the $GITLAB_FEATURES variable matches the dast feature and not when $DAST_DISABLED is set. The job executes the commands: export DAST_WEBSITE=${DAST_WEBSITE:-$(cat environment_url.txt)} and /analyze -t $DAST_WEBSITE. It uploads gl-dast-report.json as a DAST artifact report.
